features: WHY WATERFULL TONE-UP SUNSCREEN? ‚Äî Discover Korea's #1, now globally best selling facial sunscreen, offering a dewy glow and essential SPF50+PA++++ protection with a unique serum-like texture for radiant, hydrated skin
ALL-DAY HYDRATION + NATURAL TONE-UP ‚Äî A blend of Aqua-rich essence and pink glow-up technology, providing all-day moisture with no greasy feel, leaving a natural radiance.
HYBRID BROAD SPECTRUM ‚Äî Combines best of mineral and chemical UV filters for smooth, irritation-free protection against UVA and UVB rays.
SUITED FOR ALL SKIN TONES ‚Äî universally flattering pink hue enhances natural skin tones, making it a perfect base for makeup.
GENTLE & SEAMLESS ‚Äî No white cast, no clumping, and no eye stings for a flawless, irritation-free finish.
